pages.text: Splash or linger a potion onto a slime before a frog eats it, and the Froglight it drops captures that effect.$(br2)A brewed Froglight is a toggleable effect source: place it as an aura that buffs everything nearby (right-click to toggle), hold it for a personal buff, or wear it in the Curios brewed slot.
The effect is separate from the resource - a Froglight is stamped with both its variant and its effect. Smelting a brewed Froglight gives the plain resource and discards the effect.
